channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RAJINFRA] Rajeswari Infra Submits Unaudited Standalone Results
item.description:
Rajeswari Infrastructure Ltd submits unaudited standalone financial results and limited review report for the quarter ended June 30, 2025, as per SEBI LODR 2015. The company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) until January 13, 2026. A Monitoring Committee now oversees the company, and financial statements are prepared on a going concern basis. The Statutory Auditor signed the statement on May 1, 2026.

  • Rajeswari Infrastructure submits unaudited standalone financial results for Q1 2026.
  • The company was under CIRP, which concluded on January 13, 2026.
  • A Monitoring Committee now manages the company's operations.
  • Financial statements are prepared on a going concern basis after CIRP.
  • Statutory Auditor issued a limited review report for the quarter.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajeswari Infrastructure Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RAJINFRA] Rajeswari Infra Submits Unaudited Results for Sep 2025
item.description:
Rajeswari Infrastructure Ltd has submitted unaudited standalone financial results and a limited review report for the quarter and half-year ended September 30, 2025, as per Regulation 33 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) until January 13, 2026, and is now managed by a Monitoring Committee. The financial statements have been prepared on a going concern basis.

  • Unaudited standalone financial results submitted for quarter/half-year ended September 30, 2025.
  • Company was under CIRP until January 13, 2026, now managed by Monitoring Committee.
  • Financial statements prepared on a going concern basis.
  • Limited review report issued by Statutory Auditor.
  • Results submitted under Regulation 33 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajeswari Infrastructure Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [WARDINMOBI] Wardwizard Appoints Pratik Joshi as CFO, Effective May 3, 2026
item.description:
Wardwizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd. has appointed Mr. Pratik Kirit Joshi as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP), effective May 3, 2026. The appointment follows recommendations from the Audit Committee and Nomination and Remuneration Committee. Mr. Joshi brings over 18 years of experience in logistics, telecom, customer service, and financial consulting. He previously served as CEO of S D Corporation and Shree Dutt Group. The board meeting, which commenced at 02:30 P.M. and concluded at 03:10 P.M., also approved this appointment, which is aimed at strengthening the company's financial management and governance.

  • Pratik Kirit Joshi appointed as CFO and KMP of Wardwizard, effective May 3, 2026.
  • Appointment aims to strengthen financial management and governance.
  • Joshi brings 18+ years of experience in diverse sectors.
  • He previously served as CEO of S D Corporation and Shree Dutt Group.
  • Board meeting held on May 3, 2026, approved the appointment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Wardwizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GANGESSEC] Ganges Securities Board Meeting on May 14, 2026
item.description:
Ganges Securities Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, subject to shareholder approval.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 14, 2026.
  • To approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • Consideration of dividend recommendation for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ganges Securities Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RAJINFRA] Rajeswari Infra Submits Unaudited Results for Quarter Ended June 2024
item.description:
Rajeswari Infrastructure Ltd has submitted unaudited standalone financial results and the limited review report for the quarter ended June 30, 2024, as per Regulation 33 of SEBI (LODR) 2015. The company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) and the resolution plan was approved on January 13, 2026. A Monitoring Committee oversees the company's management, and the financial statements have been prepared on a going concern basis. The Statutory Auditor also signed the statement on May 1, 2026.

  • Rajeswari Infrastructure submits unaudited standalone financial results for Q1 2025.
  • Company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) until January 13, 2026.
  • Monitoring Committee oversees management; financial statements prepared on a going concern basis.
  • Statutory Auditor issued a limited review report for the quarter ended June 30, 2024.
  • Sanjay Mehra, formerly Resolution Professional, is now Chairman of the Monitoring Committee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajeswari Infrastructure Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RAJINFRA] Rajeswari Infra Submits Unaudited Standalone Results
item.description:
Rajeswari Infrastructure Ltd has submitted unaudited standalone financial results and a limited review report for the quarter and half-year ended September 30, 2024, as per Regulation 33 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company is undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) since May 10, 2023, with a resolution plan approved on January 13, 2026. A Monitoring Committee oversees the company's operations, and the financial statements have been prepared on a going concern basis.

  • Unaudited standalone financial results submitted for the quarter and half-year ended September 30, 2024.
  • Company under CIRP since May 10, 2023, resolution plan approved on January 13, 2026.
  • Monitoring Committee overseeing operations, financial statements prepared on a going concern basis.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajeswari Infrastructure Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ZENTEC] Zen Tech FY26 Revenue ₹178.08 Cr, PAT ₹31.53 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zen Technologies announced its FY26 financial results, with revenue of ₹178.08 crore and PAT of ₹31.53 crore. The company has transformed into a defense company with five capabilities. The company's consolidated order book closed at ₹1,336 crore, including new order inflows of ₹431 crore in Q4 FY26. The company expects to add new products and is well-positioned for FY27.

  • Zen Technologies FY26 revenue stood at ₹178.08 crore.
  • The company reported a PAT of ₹31.53 crore for FY26.
  • EBITDA for FY26 was ₹73.69 crore.
  • Consolidated order book closed at ₹1,336 crore.
  • New order inflows in Q4 FY26 amounted to ₹431 crore.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZEN TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MEDPLUS] Medplus Board Meeting Revised to May 20, 2026
item.description:
Medplus Health Services Ltd has revised its board meeting date from May 29, 2026, to May 20, 2026. The meeting will consider and approve the audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company will submit the audited financial results to the stock exchanges and host them on its website. The trading window for designated persons will remain closed from April 1, 2026, to May 22, 2026.

  • Medplus board meeting rescheduled to May 20, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 22, 2026.
  • Results to be published on company and stock exchange websites.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Medplus Health Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RELTD] Ravindra Energy: EIM Starts Operations at Largest EV Battery Station
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ravindra Energy Ltd's associate, Energy in Motion Limited (EIM), has commenced commercial operations at India’s largest battery swapping and charging station for heavy vehicles. Located at the Nhava Sheva Freeport Container Terminal, the automated station can service over 160 heavy EVs per day with a 3 MW installed power capacity. Over 130 EIM-Foton EVs are already utilizing the service at the port. NSFT aims to electrify its entire vehicle fleet by FY 2026-27.

  • EIM begins commercial operations at India’s largest battery swapping station.
  • The station can service over 160 heavy EVs daily with 3 MW capacity.
  • Over 130 EIM-Foton EVs are already using the station's services.
  • NSFT targets complete vehicle fleet electrification by FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ravindra Energy Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PRUDENT] Prudent Launches AI Platform for Mutual Fund Distributors
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Prudent Corporate Advisory Services Ltd has launched an AI-powered business management platform, Edge+, designed to help mutual fund distributors (MFDs) enhance their business operations. The platform offers features such as goal-based planning, business analytics, marketing tools, and research capabilities, all integrated into a single interface. Edge+ aims to streamline processes, improve client servicing, and facilitate cross-selling of financial products. The platform is currently in beta and available to Prudent's mutual fund distribution partners.

  • Prudent launches Edge+, an AI-powered platform for mutual fund distributors.
  • Edge+ offers goal planning, business analytics, marketing, and research modules.
  • The platform aims to improve client service and business growth for distributors.
  • Edge+ facilitates cross-selling of various financial products.
  • The AI platform is currently live in beta version.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prudent Corporate Advisory Services Ltd | Category: New Launch
